fields.name: request_id
fields.description: UUID of the request sent to the Inputs API, generated by the Oscilar server

fields.name: record_id
fields.description: UUID of the record associated with the primary key of this object. In case there is no primary key defined, record_id will be equal to request_id. This is set when the record is created and maintained across updates

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: event ingestion time, as recorded by the server and represented in ISO format, using UTC as timezone

fields.name: request_id
fields.description: UUID of the request sent to the Inputs API, generated by the Oscilar server

fields.name: record_id
fields.description: UUID of the record associated with the primary key of this object. In case there is no primary key defined, record_id will be equal to request_id. This is set when the record is created and maintained across updates

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: event ingestion time, as recorded by the server and represented in ISO format, using UTC as timezone

value.plaintext: OBJECT {name: OBJECT {firstName: paymentInstrument.accountHolder.firstName, lastName: paymentInstrument.accountHolder.lastName}, address: ARRAY [OBJECT {addressType: 'Current', countryCode: paymentInstrument.paymentAccount.billingAddress.country, addressLine1: paymentInstrument.paymentAccount.billingAddress.addressLine1, city: paymentInstrument.paymentAccount.billingAddress.city, region: paymentInstrument.paymentAccount.billingAddress.state, postalCode: paymentInstrument.paymentAccount.billingAddress.zip, isPrimary: TRUE}], dateOfBirth: OBJECT {day: account_holder_dob_day, month: account_holder_dob_month, year: account_holder_dob_year}, phone: ARRAY [OBJECT {countryCode: '1', number: paymentInstrument.accountHolder.phone, isPrimary: TRUE}], email: ARRAY [OBJECT {email: paymentInstrument.accountHolder.email, emailType: 'Personal'}]}

ARRAY [OBJECT {key: 'CONSENT_OPTIN_ID', value: oscilar.request_id}, OBJECT {key: 'CONSENT_OPTIN_URL', value: 'https://www.realpage.com'}, OBJECT {key: 'CONSENT_OPTIN_METHOD', value: 'Web'}, OBJECT {key: 'CONSENT_OPTIN_VERSIONID', value: '1'}, OBJECT {key: 'CONSENT_OPTIN_TIMESTAMP', value: oscilar.timestamp}]

steps.label: Get Equifax Digital Identity Trust Output

value.plaintext: 'We cannot verify you online, please contact your property manager for other options'
value.constant_value: We cannot verify you online, please contact your property manager for other options

value.plaintext: 'Expected fraud. No online transactions allowed. Contact RealPage to review if you believe they are legitimate.'
value.constant_value: Expected fraud. No online transactions allowed. Contact RealPage to review if you believe they are legitimate.

value.plaintext: 'We are reviewing your account, please check back tomorrow to make a payment'
value.constant_value: We are reviewing your account, please check back tomorrow to make a payment

value.plaintext: 'Account being reviewed, contact risk team for updates'
value.constant_value: Account being reviewed, contact risk team for updates

value.plaintext: 'Error encountered. Reach out to property manager'
value.constant_value: Error encountered. Reach out to property manager

value.plaintext: 'Success! Your account has been verified and is ready transact'
value.constant_value: Success! Your account has been verified and is ready transact
Account is approved. No action needed

edges.name: Check for Equifax run in last month

condition.plaintext: equifax_ran_value = FALSE OR equifax_ran_value IS NULL

edges.name: Check for changes to account holder info
Check for changes to payment account

condition.plaintext: paymentInstrument.accountHolder.firstName IS NULL OR paymentInstrument.accountHolder.lastName IS NULL OR (paymentInstrument.paymentAccount.billingAddress.country IS NULL OR paymentInstrument.paymentAccount.billingAddress.addressLine1 IS NULL OR paymentInstrument.paymentAccount.billingAddress.city IS NULL OR paymentInstrument.paymentAccount.billingAddress.state IS NULL OR paymentInstrument.paymentAccount.billingAddress.zip IS NULL) OR (account_holder_dob_day IS NULL OR account_holder_dob_month IS NULL OR account_holder_dob_year IS NULL)

rules.name: Default: Approve
rules.condition: NOT (lower(equifaxDecision) = 'deny') AND NOT (lower(equifaxDecision) = 'review') AND NOT (equifax_error = TRUE)

rules.name: Default: dummy_decision
rules.condition: NOT (rerun_flag = TRUE AND payment_update = FALSE) AND NOT (rerun_flag = TRUE AND payment_update = TRUE) AND NOT (rerun_flag = FALSE AND payment_update = TRUE)
